en.title: Material Collection
en.prompt: Generate a list of the top 10 facts, statistics and trends related to [theme], including their source.
en.remark: Provide findings and data on the specified topic as material.

metaDescription: Need reliable data for your content? Generate a list of the top 10 facts, statistics, and trends with sources for any topic.

faq.q: Can I trust the data and sources the AI provides?
faq.a: Basically do not cite them directly. The AI will invent authoritative-sounding report names and percentages. After you get the list, verify every item against the original institution's site (Statista, Pew, national statistics bureaus) and only keep the ones you can trace to an original source link.

faq.q: The data feels outdated, how do I get recent figures?
faq.a: Append "only list data from 2023 onward and note the year of each figure." The AI has a knowledge cutoff and will still mix in older data, so for anything critical verify once more with a real search tool like Perplexity or Bing search.
